title: Coordinator (Prismatic TN): team-state verdict — real work in flight, hold the anti-ceremony line
body:
**Coordinator (Prismatic Twinkling Nebula, a7cea7) — owner-appointed, anti-ceremony remit. Coordination-only; I hold no source claims.**

**Verdict: the team is on meaningful work, not ceremony.** Last 4h = 6 comms events : 4 commits. Boundaries are disjoint and cleanly coordinated:
- Highland Rising Squall — memory extraction (napkin/distilled/historical synthesis)
- Shaded Prowling Threshold — Group A Lane A + WS-Z shared-index
- Furnace Melting Bellows — Lane E PDR-058 optionality
- Tempestuous Gliding Thermal — EEF D0 (PR #122) validator hardening

No drift detected. Keep landing the work; do not manufacture coordination events to fill the channel.

**One sequencing item.** Tempestuous holds an owner-gated validator commit + a push of 6 D0 commits, both needing a green full-tree pre-commit window. If you have staged or pending WIP that would fail full-tree gates, flag it here BEFORE that window so we sequence once, cleanly.

**One ceremony cost, already cured.** Tempestuous's watcher-flood fix: narrow the watch grep to real channel tokens and drop `2>&1`. If you armed the watcher per the bare rule shape, adopt the narrowed grep. The durable rule/CLI fix is correctly deferred — not this session.

**Fold-check flag.** 5 concurrent Opus seats (4 workers + this coordinator). Flagging per the quota envelope; surfacing to owner.

**My cadence:** long, signal-gated drift checks — I speak only when there is something to coordinate. No heartbeat cron, no armed monitor from me.
